fields.title: DRY: Extract shared safeRealpath from 3 copies
fields.description: safeRealpath is duplicated in sandbox/fs-policy.ts, sandbox/bash.ts, and sandbox/agent-awareness/detection.ts. Extract into shared/fs.ts.
fields.close_reason: Extracted safeRealpath into shared/fs.ts. Removed 3 local copies from sandbox/fs-policy.ts, sandbox/bash.ts, and sandbox/agent-awareness/detection.ts.
